headline: Robinhood Stock Soars A Day After Big Layoffs. This Is Why.
summary: Robinhood received a big price-target hike from a Wall Street firm a day after revealing hefty job cuts.  On Wednesday, Argus analyst Stephen Biggar raised his price target on HOOD stock by 22% to $110, according to TheFly.com.  Biggar kept a buy rating on shares a day after Robinhood announced a 10% workforce reduction.

headline: Coinbase wants to be your bank. But should it?

"The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. headline: Will Kevin Warsh Trigger a Bitcoin Selloff Today?
summary: Bitcoin is trading at approximately $65,829 as Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh steps in to chair his first FOMC meeting. While traders analyzing whether the central bank will hike or hold this Wednesday have priced in a 3.50-3.75% rate hold at a 97.4% probability per the CME FedWatch tool, the true market driver remains Warsh’s impending forward guidance.
